title: Guided Workshop Checklist
concept: A table-led onboarding workspace for educators that keeps saved Playground management as the first screen while a progress checklist walks users through creation, saving, runtime settings, Site Manager tools, blueprint browsing, and portability.
flows: Choose a start source from vanilla WordPress, WordPress PR, Gutenberg PR or branch, GitHub import, Blueprint URL, zip import, or featured blueprints.
Save a temporary Playground to browser storage or a local directory with visible file-copy progress.
Manage saved and unsaved browser Playgrounds with open, rename, and delete actions from the primary table.
Use Site Manager tabs for settings, file browser, Blueprint editor, database tools, logs, and additional export actions.
Browse and filter all Blueprint gallery entries while keeping the guided checklist context visible.
featureCoverage: import from GitHub with account connection messaging
navigate active WordPress paths with URL input
edit WordPress, PHP, and language settings
understand destructive reset and saved reload behavior
use File browser with create file, create folder, upload, browse, and code editing affordances
view, copy, download, and run the current Blueprint bundle
inspect database driver, path, and size
